creator: dd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-doc->bp

Over to person responsible for fixing this stuff. 
Boris: the patches look pretty good, but I'm not sure if all the stuff 
they remove has been fixed.  For example, does running find(1) on a union 
still shadow the entire tree in the upper layer?  This change says it 
doesn't.
